user.title: Tankstellen Austria
user.description: Set up fuel price monitoring for your area.

data_description.dynamic_entity: Optional: select a device_tracker entity to update prices based on your current GPS position. Leave empty for fixed location mode. Note: in dynamic mode the update interval above is ignored — a 6-hour safety-net timer is used instead.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Tankstellen Austria
reconfigure.description: Update the location and other settings for this entry. Existing entities are preserved.

data_description.dynamic_entity: Optional: select a device_tracker entity to update prices based on your current GPS position. Leave empty for fixed location mode. Note: in dynamic mode the update interval above is ignored — a 6-hour safety-net timer is used instead.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the E-Control API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_location: Please select a valid location on the map.
error.no_fuel_type: Please select at least one fuel type.

abort.already_configured: A Tankstellen Austria entry for this location already exists.

api_timeout.message: E-Control API timed out for {fuel_type} after 30s

api_invalid_content_type.message: E-Control API returned unexpected content-type for {fuel_type} (status {status}): {reason}

api_invalid_json.message: E-Control API returned invalid JSON for {fuel_type} (status {status}): {error}

api_invalid_response.message: E-Control API returned unexpected payload for {fuel_type} (status {status}): expected list, got {got}

api_all_failed.message: All fuel types failed ({failed_count}/{total_count}); first error on {fuel_type}: {error}

tracker_missing.title: Location tracker unavailable
tracker_missing.description: The device_tracker entity **{entity_id}** configured for dynamic mode on **{entry_title}** is unavailable or reports no coordinates. Updates are falling back to Home Assistant's home location. Either restore the tracker, or reconfigure this entry to switch to fixed-location mode.
